user.title: Jullix API Token
user.description: Enter your Jullix API token from Mijn Jullix → Profiel → API-tokens. The token is used to authenticate with the Jullix platform.

data_description.api_token: JWT token from the Jullix portal

installations.title: Select Installation(s)
installations.description: Choose which Jullix installation(s) to add. You can select multiple installations.

local.title: Jullix-Direct (Optional)
local.description: Optionally add a local Jullix device for real-time data without internet. Leave empty to skip. Use jullix.local or the IP address.

data_description.local_host: Hostname or IP of local Jullix device

error.invalid_token: Invalid API token. Please check your token in Mijn Jullix → Profiel → API-tokens.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Jullix. Check your internet connection.
error.no_installations: No installations found for this account.
error.local_connection_failed: Could not connect to local Jullix device. Check hostname or IP.

abort.already_configured: This Jullix account is already configured.

init.title: Jullix Options
init.description: Configure update interval and entity groups.

data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data (30-300 seconds)
data_description.enable_charger_control: Allow controlling chargers from Home Assistant
data_description.enable_plug_control: Allow controlling smart plugs from Home Assistant
data_description.use_local: Use local Jullix for real-time data when configured
